summary: Fix _matchesContext() blocker #1: remove success_rate>0.7 fallback and enforce avoidWhen selection hints. Eliminates toxic combination where default 0.75 success_rate caused all imported skills to match all contexts.

added: avoidWhen check in _matchesContext() before tag matching at line 288
New test file selection.test.js with 3 test cases
modified: _matchesContext() now returns false instead of success_rate fallback

notes: TDD cycle: RED (failing tests) → GREEN (implementation) → REFACTOR (extracted _isAvoidContext). All skill-rl-manager tests pass (19/19). No regressions.
